journal.text: Ran the full scraper cycle, compared three video directions, selected Signal Brief, and rendered a private review MP4.

templates.title: Signal Brief / v1
templates.source_title: How to use ChatGPT Work for everyday tasks
templates.hook: Stop starting important work from a blank prompt.
templates.proof: Give the agent real inputs, constraints, review expectations, and the destination format.
templates.cta: Turn one repeated workflow into a reusable template.
